word: H7387 - רֵיקָם - rêyqâm - ray-kawm' - Without cause

sections.paragraph:
Original: ריקם

Transliteration: rêyqâm

Phonetic: ray-kawm'

BDB Definition:

  1. vainly, emptily
    1. in empty condition, empty, emptily
    2. in vain, without effect, vainly

Origin: from H7386

TWOT entry: 2161c

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
